notes: collisionspike TKT-102 + TKT-147: the real Tractable damage-capture summary PDF (Vehicle Information block, label-on-one-line / value-on-the-next). Pins: vrm from 'Registration Number' (normalized uppercase); vehicle_model from the TKT-147 two_label_join 'Producer'+'Model' capture ('Volkswagen'+'Touran' -> 'Volkswagen Touran' - the two-column layout interleaves Repair Summary rows into the plain text, so no single-label capture sees both halves and a between_labels capture reads the interleaved junk; pre-TKT-147 this pinned model-only 'Touran'); vin from the 'VIN' label (the TKT-147 envelope-only field slot - PRESENT on this sample; TRACTABLE_02 pins the absent case); incident_date from the same-line 'Accident Date:' (ctime-style 'Mon Jul 06 2026' -> weekday-stripped by normalize_date); mileage comma-grouped. CRITICAL empties: reference stays EMPTY (the Tractable 'Case ID' UUID and the AI-quote money figures must never mint a case_ref - fallback suppressed), work_provider stays EMPTY (Tractable is an image-capture service CE commissions, never a work provider), claimant_* and inspection_address stay EMPTY (the PDF header carries CE's OWN desk@ address - the claimant_email fallback would mint it).
